log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Siren — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:15+3=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:3+-2=1 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:15+-2=13 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 2/3 targets affected.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Siren — Armored Escapist with Greataxe: [d20:5+9=14 vs AC 20] MISS.
Frost Giant attacks Siren — Armored Escapist with Greataxe: [d20:12+9=21 vs AC 20] HIT! 28 damage. Siren — Armored Escapist HP: 31/59
→ Siren — Armored Escapist loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 6 vs DC 14]
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Siren — Armored Escapist with Greatclub: [d20:10+6=16 vs AC 20] MISS.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Siren — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:11+3=14 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Siren — Armored Escapist with Greatclub (distance 10ft, range 5ft).
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Frost Giant WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:10+3=13 vs DC 15] FAIL — still paralyzed.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Siren — Armored Escapist with Greatclub: [d20:15+6=21 vs AC 20] HIT! 19 damage. Siren — Armored Escapist HP: 12/59
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Siren — Armored Escapist's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Siren — Armored Escapist is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Siren — Armored Escapist.
→ Siren — Armored Escapist healed for 7 HP. HP: 19/59
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Siren — Armored Escapist with Greatclub: [d20:10+6=16 vs AC 20] MISS.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Siren — Armored Escapist with Greataxe: [d20:6+9=15 vs AC 20] MISS.
Frost Giant attacks Siren — Armored Escapist with Greataxe: [d20:19+9=28 vs AC 20] HIT! 17 damage. Siren — Armored Escapist HP: 2/59
→ Siren — Armored Escapist loses concentration on Greater Invisibility! [CON save 5 vs DC 10]
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Siren — Armored Escapist with Greatclub: [d20:15+6=21 vs AC 20] HIT! 13 damage. Siren — Armored Escapist HP: 0/59
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
